## Checklist

- [ ] Targets the `development` branch
- [ ] Compiles cleanly: `mvn package -DskipTests -Dgpg.skip`
- [ ] Public classes/methods have Javadoc
- [ ] No `System.out` / `System.err` added to library code
- [ ] Follows project conventions (Jackson 2.x, `Routes`/`ApiClient`, LazyLoader entities, Action + ActionExecutor)
- [ ] No secrets (tokens, GPG keys, `settings.xml`, `*.token`) committed
